sitemap._comment_fetchStrategy: Use 'file' if your site uses Vercel or Cloudflare bot protection. Use 'http' if your sitemap is publicly accessible without protection.
sitemap._comment_localFilePath: Download your sitemaps locally first using: curl https://yoursite.com/sitemap.xml -o sitemaps/yoursite/sitemap-index.xml

search._comment_apiUrl: Replace YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID with the number in your Discover API URL. Find it in DevTools network tab.
search._comment_apiKey: Store your API key as an environment variable. Never hardcode it here.

sections.name: Products
sections._comment_widgetId: Find this in DevTools: trigger a search, look for rfk_id in the POST payload to discover.sitecorecloud.io
sections._comment_sources: Find this in DevTools: look for the sources array in the same POST payload
sections._comment_urlPatterns: URL path prefixes to filter sitemap URLs for this section. Only URLs starting with these paths are compared against this widget.

thresholds._comment: Warning fires when coverage drops below warningPercent. Critical fires below criticalPercent.
